name: python3-pyqt6.qtmultimedia
title: python3-pyqt6.qtmultimedia
summary: Python bindings for Qt 6 Multimedia module
description:
Python bindings for Qt 6 Multimedia module
Qt Multimedia API provides a rich set of classes to handle multimedia content.
.
This package contains the QtMultimedia, QtMultimediaWidgets and QtSpatialAudio
modules of PyQt6.
